##NAMES=Ferrofettelite
##RRUFFID=R100124
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[Ag_6_As_2_S_7_][Ag_10_FeAs_2_S_8_]
##LOCALITY=Nieder-Berbach, Odenwald, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Dark reddish thin platy crystals associated with proustite and xanthoconite. Analysis of this sample is reported in Bindi et al (2012) and Bindi and Downs (2022). This is the type specimen.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R100124
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ag_16.04_Fe_0.55_Hg_0.40_Cu_0.02_Sb_0.03_As_3.94_S_15.02_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 26 b: 15.067 c: 15.512 alpha: 90 beta: 90.29 gamma: 90 volume: 6076.6 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
